summary: Comprehensive testing of redesigned Supplier Profile Page. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (GET /api/suppliers/{slug}/profile, GET /api/suppliers/directory, POST /api/suppliers/{slug}/enquiry, 404 handling). Frontend: 39/39 tests passed covering all features: hero card, badges, CTAs, metrics row, 5 tabs with hash navigation, Overview/Catalog/Inventory/Reviews/Orders content, sidebar enquiry form submission, Supplier Snapshot, Similar Suppliers, WhatsApp float, empty catalog state, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/suppliers/pali-mills/profile returns 200 with seller data
Backend: GET /api/suppliers/test-fabrics-co/profile returns 200 with 1 fabric
Backend: GET /api/suppliers/directory returns array of active suppliers
Backend: GET /api/suppliers/nonexistent/profile returns 404
Backend: Supplier profile has review_stats with sub_ratings
Backend: Supplier profile has similar_suppliers array
Backend: Supplier profile seller object has all required fields
Backend: Supplier profile stats object has all required fields
Backend: POST /api/suppliers/pali-mills/enquiry saves enquiry successfully
Backend: POST /api/suppliers/test-fabrics-co/enquiry with minimal fields works
Frontend: Supplier profile page renders at /suppliers/cotton/jawahar-nagar/pali-mills
Frontend: H1 contains company name 'Pali Mills'
Frontend: Breadcrumbs visible with Home > Suppliers > cotton > jawahar-nagar > Pali Mills
Frontend: Hero section visible with logo, badges, CTAs
Frontend: Share button present
Frontend: Send Enquiry button present
Frontend: Request Sample button present
Frontend: Metrics row shows 4 cards (Orders, On-Time, SKUs, Years)
Frontend: Tab navigation has 5 tabs (Overview, Catalog, Inventory, Reviews, Orders & Terms)
Frontend: Clicking Catalog tab updates URL hash to #catalog
Frontend: Catalog panel visible after clicking tab
Frontend: Catalog category filter present
Frontend: Clicking Inventory tab updates URL hash to #inventory
Frontend: Inventory panel visible
Frontend: Clicking Reviews tab updates URL hash to #reviews
Frontend: Reviews panel visible
Frontend: Clicking Orders tab updates URL hash to #orders
Frontend: Orders panel visible
Frontend: RFQ modal opens when clicking Request Sample button
Frontend: RFQ modal closes successfully
Frontend: Sidebar enquiry form fields present (name, company, submit)
Frontend: Enquiry form submits successfully - button shows 'Enquiry Sent!'
Frontend: WhatsApp floating button visible at bottom-right
Frontend: Supplier Snapshot grid shows Rating, On-time, SKUs
Frontend: test-fabrics-co shows Verified Supplier badge (GST verified)
Frontend: test-fabrics-co metrics show 1 Active SKU
Frontend: test-fabrics-co Catalog tab shows 1 fabric card
Frontend: Similar Suppliers section shows 4 suppliers
Frontend: Empty catalog state shows 'No products found' for seller with 0 SKUs
Frontend: Send Enquiry button scrolls to sidebar form
Frontend: Reviews tab shows 5 rating distribution bars
Frontend: Reviews tab shows 4 sub-ratings (quality, communication, on_time_delivery, packaging)
Frontend: Page renders correctly on mobile viewport (390x844)
Frontend: Tab navigation present on mobile
Frontend: CTA buttons visible on mobile
Frontend: Enquiry form accessible on mobile
critical_code_review_comments: SupplierProfilePage.js: Well-structured component with proper SEO meta tags and JSON-LD structured data
SupplierProfile.css: Clean CSS with design tokens, responsive breakpoints at 1024px, 720px, 640px, 480px
supplier_profile_router.py: Proper slug matching, stats aggregation, and similar suppliers logic
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Hash-based tab navigation works correctly for SEO
Enquiry form submission works end-to-end with success state feedback
seed_data_creation: None - used existing sellers (Pali Mills, Test Fabrics Co.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier Profile Page redesign fully tested and working. Test URLs: /suppliers/cotton/jawahar-nagar/pali-mills (0 SKUs, no GST), /suppliers/fabrics/mumbai/test-fabrics-co (1 SKU, GST verified). All features working: hero card with badges, 4 metrics cards, 5 tabbed sections with hash navigation, sidebar enquiry form (POST /api/suppliers/{slug}/enquiry), Supplier Snapshot, Similar Suppliers, WhatsApp float, empty catalog state, mobile responsive.
